pending.body: fix-now/high: Propose-new-bead amendments can make a completed run fail during success reconciliation. The prompt says `propose_new_bead` only needs `proposed_bead_summary` (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs:455`), and final-review normalization preserves `ProposeNewBead` when that summary exists while allowing `proposed_title`, `proposed_scope`, `severity`, and `rationale` to remain absent (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:600`). Later, `reconcile_proposed_beads_after_success` still treats accepted `ProposeNewBead` amendments as actionable and returns an error if those older metadata fields are missing (`src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1108`). A model following the new contract can therefore produce a valid final-review payload that breaks post-run reconciliation. Remediation: until the new-bead routing bead owns this path, downgrade summary-only proposed-bead amendments to `FixCurrentBead` before persistence or make success reconciliation ignore them; alternatively require and prompt for the full metadata it already expects.

fix-now/medium: `covered_by_existing_bead` is not actually fix-now-equivalent for current behavior. Final-review aggregation preserves a `mapped_to_bead_id` for covered-by amendments (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:761`), while the post-success reconstruction path records planned-elsewhere mappings for any accepted amendment with `mapped_to_bead_id`, without checking whether routing is supposed to be active (`src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1262`). That bypasses the current bead's light-wiring-only scope: accepted covered-by findings can still create planned-elsewhere state/comments after success even though non-default classes are supposed to be observed and logged only for now. Remediation: keep the metadata inspectable, but gate reconstruction/routing so it does not consume the new classification fields until the planned-elsewhere routing bead enables that behavior.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 3 -> Plan and Implement
